description: The lockdown is explained as a routine security measure, but the Inhumans quickly grow suspicious. Daisy struggles with having to mislead her teammates at Coulson's request, while Mack and Lincoln attempt to keep things calm. Frustration grows within the Secret Warriors as they realize they are being kept under observation, foreshadowing the coming mistrust.

transcript.line: What do you mean? I'm not leave?
This is common. It's just a security thing since Malick's here.
Security? (in Spanish) More like paranoid. (in English) I want to do something, or I go home.
Have they cracked him yet?
He's cooperating, but we have to be patient. We'll get our chance.
Have you talked to Joey yet?
I've tried. I can't find him anywhere.
Time for your pain meds.
I don't want that.
Trust me, in an hour, you will.
Those knock me out.
May, he's trying to help you. Just give me a minute with her. Meet me in my room?
Yeah.
How are you doing, really?
I'm in a lot of pain, and I hate this hospital gown.
Mm. You think?
You did good today. You led them well.
Does it ever get any easier?
Only harder. Why?
I think Coulson's having me lie to them about the base lockdown. They can feel it.
Sometimes, that's the job.
Doesn't feel right.
If he's withholding, I'm sure it's for the right reasons.
